insight_source_id.title: Source ID
insight_source_id.description: Stable identifier for this GitHub instance (e.g., 'github-acme-prod').

github_token.title: Access Token
github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token or GitHub App installation token. Required scopes: repo, read:org, read:user.

github_organizations.title: Organizations
github_organizations.description: List of GitHub organization logins to collect (e.g., ['myorg']).

github_start_date.title: Start Date
github_start_date.description: UTC date for initial collection (ISO 8601). Commits before this date are skipped on the first run. Default: no limit.

github_page_size_graphql_commits.title: GraphQL Commits Page Size
github_page_size_graphql_commits.description: Number of commits per GraphQL request (max 100).

github_page_size_graphql_prs.title: GraphQL PRs Page Size
github_page_size_graphql_prs.description: Number of PRs per GraphQL request (max 50).

github_rate_limit_threshold.title: Rate Limit Threshold
github_rate_limit_threshold.description: Proactive backoff when remaining API budget drops below this value.

github_max_workers.title: Concurrent Workers
github_max_workers.description: Number of parallel threads for child stream fetches (reviews, comments, commit files, PR commits).
